message:
fix(e2e): Use macro for run_workflow_test to capture correct line numbers

The previous function-based approach caused all tests to report the same
line number (the function definition line) because line!() is evaluated
at compile time. Converting to a macro ensures line!() captures the
actual call site, making debugging much easier.

Before: All tests reported line 1153
After: Each test reports its actual line number

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
